pollIntervalHelp: Too frequent polling may cause HTTP 403 errors from the Grohe API. Recommended: 300s or higher. On errors the interval increases automatically (up to 1h) and resets after a successful poll.
notifyAlertsHelp: Send ioBroker notifications for critical Grohe alarms (flooding, water shut-off, sensor errors) and high-priority warnings.
notifyControlsHelp: Send ioBroker notifications when the valve state changes (opened/closed) or when an active control command is triggered.
notifyStatusHelp: Send ioBroker notifications when a Grohe device goes online or offline.
notifyWarningsHelp: Send ioBroker notifications for non-critical warnings (battery low, temperature/humidity out of range, WiFi loss, Blue filter/CO₂ low, etc.).
notifyErrorsHelp: Send ioBroker notifications when the adapter fails to reach the Grohe API (e.g. HTTP 401, 403) and when it recovers.
